extract: Iron Leaves (Japanese: テツノイサハ Tetsunoisaha) is a dual-type Grass/Psychic Paradox Pokémon introduced during Generation IX. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Iron Leaves is said to be either a future relative of Virizion or a version of it from a parallel timeline. Iron Leaves was revealed alongside Walking Wake during the Pokémon Presents that aired on February 27, 2023, and debuted that same day in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet's Version 1.2.0 update.
